records.m_Talk_ENG: The Corrupted Area spread all the way inside the base camp?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Corrupted Area spread all the way inside the base camp?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Corrupted Area spread all the way inside the base camp?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If Campamento's Corruption Inhibitor can't even function, this is no ordinary crisis!
records.m_Talk_DEU: If Campamento's Corruption Inhibitor can't even function, this is no ordinary crisis!
records.m_Talk_FRA: If Campamento's Corruption Inhibitor can't even function, this is no ordinary crisis!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Come on, Robin! Don't just stand there! Move it!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Come on, Robin! Don't just stand there! Move it!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Come on, Robin! Don't just stand there! Move it!

records.m_Talk_ENG: M-Ms. Mi Rinae!
records.m_Talk_DEU: M-Ms. Mi Rinae!
records.m_Talk_FRA: M-Ms. Mi Rinae!

records.m_Talk_ENG: C.O.s are swarming in! We can't just leave them!
records.m_Talk_DEU: C.O.s are swarming in! We can't just leave them!
records.m_Talk_FRA: C.O.s are swarming in! We can't just leave them!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did you forget what Teach said? We have our own mission here!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did you forget what Teach said? We have our own mission here!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did you forget what Teach said? We have our own mission here!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Can't you see they're buying us time?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Can't you see they're buying us time?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Can't you see they're buying us time?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Y-yes, but...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Y-yes, but...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Y-yes, but...

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're the Counters sent from Ground One, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're the Counters sent from Ground One, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're the Counters sent from Ground One, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: We've been briefed! Leave this sector to us!
records.m_Talk_DEU: We've been briefed! Leave this sector to us!
records.m_Talk_FRA: We've been briefed! Leave this sector to us!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Campamento Administration is strong! Our TASKFORCEs are tightly bonded!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Campamento Administration is strong! Our TASKFORCEs are tightly bonded!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Campamento Administration is strong! Our TASKFORCEs are tightly bonded!

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's right! Disasters like this are practically routine just outside base camp!
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's right! Disasters like this are practically routine just outside base camp!
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's right! Disasters like this are practically routine just outside base camp!

records.m_Talk_ENG: So trust us and go! Save our VIP!
records.m_Talk_DEU: So trust us and go! Save our VIP!
records.m_Talk_FRA: So trust us and go! Save our VIP!

records.m_Talk_ENG: He may be eccentric, but we can't do without him!
records.m_Talk_DEU: He may be eccentric, but we can't do without him!
records.m_Talk_FRA: He may be eccentric, but we can't do without him!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha! Don't you worry!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha! Don't you worry!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha! Don't you worry!

records.m_Talk_ENG: We're Ground Administration's finest of the fine. We'll bring back old man Khan safe and sound.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We're Ground Administration's finest of the fine. We'll bring back old man Khan safe and sound.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We're Ground Administration's finest of the fine. We'll bring back old man Khan safe and sound.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Right, Robin?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Right, Robin?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Right, Robin?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Ah, yes...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Ah, yes...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Ah, yes...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: On my honor as a knight, I promise you all!
records.m_Talk_DEU: On my honor as a knight, I promise you all!
records.m_Talk_FRA: On my honor as a knight, I promise you all!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You heard them! The base camp's last line of defense is ours to hold!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You heard them! The base camp's last line of defense is ours to hold!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You heard them! The base camp's last line of defense is ours to hold!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if it costs us our lives, we'll see the Counters through!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if it costs us our lives, we'll see the Counters through!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if it costs us our lives, we'll see the Counters through!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now do you get it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now do you get it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now do you get it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The weight of what we're about to do... what it means to be a Counter on the battlefield.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The weight of what we're about to do... what it means to be a Counter on the battlefield.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The weight of what we're about to do... what it means to be a Counter on the battlefield.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We are their hope.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We are their hope.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We are their hope.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. I understand. I won't hesitate again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. I understand. I won't hesitate again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. I understand. I won't hesitate again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha! That look in your eyes. I like it! Glad you caught my drift.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha! That look in your eyes. I like it! Glad you caught my drift.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha! That look in your eyes. I like it! Glad you caught my drift.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let's go. Follow me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let's go. Follow me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let's go. Follow me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We received word from Ground One's Senior.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We received word from Ground One's Senior.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We received word from Ground One's Senior.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you for answering Campamento Administration's request.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you for answering Campamento Administration's request.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you for answering Campamento Administration's request.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Aw, c'mon. Neighbors help each other in hard times, don't they?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Aw, c'mon. Neighbors help each other in hard times, don't they?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Aw, c'mon. Neighbors help each other in hard times, don't they?

records.m_Talk_ENG: And even without old man Khan, you've all been handling the crisis pretty well yourselves.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And even without old man Khan, you've all been handling the crisis pretty well yourselves.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And even without old man Khan, you've all been handling the crisis pretty well yourselves.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, I suppose we've gotten used to emergencies.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well, I suppose we've gotten used to emergencies.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, I suppose we've gotten used to emergencies.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Not that complacency is a good thing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Not that complacency is a good thing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Not that complacency is a good thing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Our VIP always brings trouble down on Campamento.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Our VIP always brings trouble down on Campamento.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Our VIP always brings trouble down on Campamento.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Claims against us from other cities alone exceed seven billion credits.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Claims against us from other cities alone exceed seven billion credits.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Claims against us from other cities alone exceed seven billion credits.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ahaha... Seven billion...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ahaha... Seven billion...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ahaha... Seven billion...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What kind of nonsense has that old man been up to...
records.m_Talk_DEU: What kind of nonsense has that old man been up to...
records.m_Talk_FRA: What kind of nonsense has that old man been up to...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Still, he looks after our people like family.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Still, he looks after our people like family.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Still, he looks after our people like family.

records.m_Talk_ENG: For all his faults, you just can't hate him.
records.m_Talk_DEU: For all his faults, you just can't hate him.
records.m_Talk_FRA: For all his faults, you just can't hate him.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But Ms. Mi Rinae...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But Ms. Mi Rinae...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But Ms. Mi Rinae...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: How do you know Campamento's Senior?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How do you know Campamento's Senior?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How do you know Campamento's Senior?

records.m_Talk_ENG: A-ha, that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A-ha, that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A-ha, that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I know him all too well. That old man used to be a <color=#ffd34c>person of interest</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I know him all too well. That old man used to be a <color=#ffd34c>person of interest</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I know him all too well. That old man used to be a <color=#ffd34c>person of interest</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A person of interest?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A person of interest?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A person of interest?

records.m_Talk_ENG: These days they call him Senior Khan. But back then, he went by Master Khan.
records.m_Talk_DEU: These days they call him Senior Khan. But back then, he went by Master Khan.
records.m_Talk_FRA: These days they call him Senior Khan. But back then, he went by Master Khan.

records.m_Talk_ENG: After the Administration Failure, and the Counterside was exposed to the public...
records.m_Talk_DEU: After the Administration Failure, and the Counterside was exposed to the public...
records.m_Talk_FRA: After the Administration Failure, and the Counterside was exposed to the public...

records.m_Talk_ENG: He became the treasure hunter who unearthed more Artifacts than anyone else.
records.m_Talk_DEU: He became the treasure hunter who unearthed more Artifacts than anyone else.
records.m_Talk_FRA: He became the treasure hunter who unearthed more Artifacts than anyone else.

records.m_Talk_ENG: C-Campamento's Senior sounds like an amazing man...
records.m_Talk_DEU: C-Campamento's Senior sounds like an amazing man...
records.m_Talk_FRA: C-Campamento's Senior sounds like an amazing man...

records.m_Talk_ENG: In a way, yeah, he is.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In a way, yeah, he is.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In a way, yeah, he is.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...But you know what they say. Too much of anything is poison.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...But you know what they say. Too much of anything is poison.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...But you know what they say. Too much of anything is poison.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Especially when technology and mysteries beyond our world's level spike the global Corruption rate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Especially when technology and mysteries beyond our world's level spike the global Corruption rate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Especially when technology and mysteries beyond our world's level spike the global Corruption rate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No wonder he got marked as a person of interest by the Administration.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No wonder he got marked as a person of interest by the Administration.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No wonder he got marked as a person of interest by the Administration.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And <color=#ffd34c>cleaning up</color> his messes under Teach's name gave me my share of headaches too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And <color=#ffd34c>cleaning up</color> his messes under Teach's name gave me my share of headaches too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And <color=#ffd34c>cleaning up</color> his messes under Teach's name gave me my share of headaches too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Cleaning up...? What do you mean by that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Cleaning up...? What do you mean by that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Cleaning up...? What do you mean by that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: We've arrived.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We've arrived.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We've arrived.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Please wait a moment...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Please wait a moment...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Please wait a moment...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Lady Sita, the Counters dispatched from Ground One have arrived.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Lady Sita, the Counters dispatched from Ground One have arrived.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Lady Sita, the Counters dispatched from Ground One have arrived.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Please, come inside.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Please, come inside.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Please, come inside.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is Lady Sita, temporarily overseeing the Campamento Administration.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is Lady Sita, temporarily overseeing the Campamento Administration.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is Lady Sita, temporarily overseeing the Campamento Administration.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She's the VIP's granddaughter, you could say.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She's the VIP's granddaughter, you could say.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She's the VIP's granddaughter, you could say.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ahaha, you've got a rather unusual way of greeting us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ahaha, you've got a rather unusual way of greeting us.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ahaha, you've got a rather unusual way of greeting us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Pleased to meet you. I'm Mi Rinae, and this here's Robin.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Pleased to meet you. I'm Mi Rinae, and this here's Robin.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Pleased to meet you. I'm Mi Rinae, and this here's Robin.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Um... hello? Can you hear us?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Um... hello? Can you hear us?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Um... hello? Can you hear us?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Her voice...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Her voice...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Her voice...

records.m_Talk_ENG: "Hello, everyone."
records.m_Talk_DEU: "Hello, everyone."
records.m_Talk_FRA: "Hello, everyone."

records.m_Talk_ENG: "Thank you for answering Campamento Administration's call."
records.m_Talk_DEU: "Thank you for answering Campamento Administration's call."
records.m_Talk_FRA: "Thank you for answering Campamento Administration's call."

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...is what Lady Sita says to you all.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...is what Lady Sita says to you all.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...is what Lady Sita says to you all.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
W-what the
8g? What's going on here?!
records.m_Talk_DEU:
W-what the
8g? What's going on here?!
records.m_Talk_FRA:
W-what the
8g? What's going on here?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Wait, Ms. Mi Rinae!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Wait, Ms. Mi Rinae!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Wait, Ms. Mi Rinae!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I-I think I just heard a whisper in my ear...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I-I think I just heard a whisper in my ear...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I-I think I just heard a whisper in my ear...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What? Really?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What? Really?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What? Really?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe your <color=#ffd34c>thought</color> frequencies just synced.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe your <color=#ffd34c>thought</color> frequencies just synced.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe your <color=#ffd34c>thought</color> frequencies just synced.

records.m_Talk_ENG: "How strange. It wasn't intentional, but this is the first time it's happened."
records.m_Talk_DEU: "How strange. It wasn't intentional, but this is the first time it's happened."
records.m_Talk_FRA: "How strange. It wasn't intentional, but this is the first time it's happened."

records.m_Talk_ENG: "Maybe we'll become good friends."
records.m_Talk_DEU: "Maybe we'll become good friends."
records.m_Talk_FRA: "Maybe we'll become good friends."

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...is what Lady Sita says to Robin.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...is what Lady Sita says to Robin.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...is what Lady Sita says to Robin.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thought frequency? Is that like telepathy...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thought frequency? Is that like telepathy...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thought frequency? Is that like telepathy...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: N-nah! There's way too much to nitpick here...
records.m_Talk_DEU: N-nah! There's way too much to nitpick here...
records.m_Talk_FRA: N-nah! There's way too much to nitpick here...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Please forgive...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Please forgive...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Please forgive...

records.m_Talk_ENG:
"Please forgive me, Ms. Mi Rinae. We haven
8kt met before... and I tend to be shy around strangers..."
records.m_Talk_DEU:
"Please forgive me, Ms. Mi Rinae. We haven
8kt met before... and I tend to be shy around strangers..."
records.m_Talk_FRA:
"Please forgive me, Ms. Mi Rinae. We haven
8kt met before... and I tend to be shy around strangers..."

records.m_Talk_ENG: "Normally, I have my secretary relay my words."
records.m_Talk_DEU: "Normally, I have my secretary relay my words."
records.m_Talk_FRA: "Normally, I have my secretary relay my words."

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...is what Lady Sita says with regret.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...is what Lady Sita says with regret.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...is what Lady Sita says with regret.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wow! Seriously... this is worse than Bora ever was!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wow! Seriously... this is worse than Bora ever was!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wow! Seriously... this is worse than Bora ever was!

records.m_Talk_ENG: At least Bora could still communicate... But this girl leaves even that to someone else?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: At least Bora could still communicate... But this girl leaves even that to someone else?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: At least Bora could still communicate... But this girl leaves even that to someone else?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: P-please calm down, Ms. Mi Rinae...
records.m_Talk_DEU: P-please calm down, Ms. Mi Rinae...
records.m_Talk_FRA: P-please calm down, Ms. Mi Rinae...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then what about you?! Why are you putting on a performance too?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then what about you?! Why are you putting on a performance too?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then what about you?! Why are you putting on a performance too?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, I majored in storytelling at university...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, I majored in storytelling at university...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, I majored in storytelling at university...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Aha! I get it now!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Aha! I get it now!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Aha! I get it now!

records.m_Talk_ENG: So that's the gimmick! Right, right! Makes sense!
records.m_Talk_DEU: So that's the gimmick! Right, right! Makes sense!
records.m_Talk_FRA: So that's the gimmick! Right, right! Makes sense!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ms. Mi Rinae's... starting to reject reality...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ms. Mi Rinae's... starting to reject reality...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ms. Mi Rinae's... starting to reject reality...

records.m_Talk_ENG: So to sum up...
records.m_Talk_DEU: So to sum up...
records.m_Talk_FRA: So to sum up...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Old man Khan went to the floating island chasing the Golden Vale's Legacy?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Old man Khan went to the floating island chasing the Golden Vale's Legacy?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Old man Khan went to the floating island chasing the Golden Vale's Legacy?

records.m_Talk_ENG: But given Campamento's Celestial Grand Dimension Crevice, there should be loads of floating isles, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But given Campamento's Celestial Grand Dimension Crevice, there should be loads of floating isles, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But given Campamento's Celestial Grand Dimension Crevice, there should be loads of floating isles, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Last...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Last...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Last...

records.m_Talk_ENG: "Last reported location was the <color=#ffd34c>Dawnbreak Floating Island</color>."
records.m_Talk_DEU: "Last reported location was the <color=#ffd34c>Dawnbreak Floating Island</color>."
records.m_Talk_FRA: "Last reported location was the <color=#ffd34c>Dawnbreak Floating Island</color>."

records.m_Talk_ENG: What a strange name... Dawnbreak Floating Island?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What a strange name... Dawnbreak Floating Island?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What a strange name... Dawnbreak Floating Island?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, might sound odd to us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, might sound odd to us.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, might sound odd to us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But most of those isles were once home to tribes of the Amazon Basin.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But most of those isles were once home to tribes of the Amazon Basin.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But most of those isles were once home to tribes of the Amazon Basin.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Amazon Basin tribes?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Amazon Basin tribes?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Amazon Basin tribes?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's right. Even twenty years after the Grand Dimension Crevice, some still live on the floating islands.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's right. Even twenty years after the Grand Dimension Crevice, some still live on the floating islands.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's right. Even twenty years after the Grand Dimension Crevice, some still live on the floating islands.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There's the Stormy Floating Island, the Turbulent Floating Island, the Misty Floating Island...
records.m_Talk_DEU: There's the Stormy Floating Island, the Turbulent Floating Island, the Misty Floating Island...
records.m_Talk_FRA: There's the Stormy Floating Island, the Turbulent Floating Island, the Misty Floating Island...

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Administration manages them, but respects the natives' names.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Administration manages them, but respects the natives' names.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Administration manages them, but respects the natives' names.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I see... let's see here...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I see... let's see here...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I see... let's see here...

records.m_Talk_ENG: On the map, Dawnbreak Floating Island is here... altitude ten thousand meters.
records.m_Talk_DEU: On the map, Dawnbreak Floating Island is here... altitude ten thousand meters.
records.m_Talk_FRA: On the map, Dawnbreak Floating Island is here... altitude ten thousand meters.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Good. Then no need to worry.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Good. Then no need to worry.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Good. Then no need to worry.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Time's short. Just get us the gear to reach the floating island. We'll be back before you know it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Time's short. Just get us the gear to reach the floating island. We'll be back before you know it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Time's short. Just get us the gear to reach the floating island. We'll be back before you know it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-what is it, Lady Sita?
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-what is it, Lady Sita?
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-what is it, Lady Sita?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No, you mustn't! With the VIP absent, if you leave too...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: No, you mustn't! With the VIP absent, if you leave too...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: No, you mustn't! With the VIP absent, if you leave too...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...But.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...But.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...But.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Still... even so...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Still... even so...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Still... even so...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Understood.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Understood.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Understood.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh for crying out loud. I've seen it all, but this is a first.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh for crying out loud. I've seen it all, but this is a first.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh for crying out loud. I've seen it all, but this is a first.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Robin, what are they mumbling about now?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Robin, what are they mumbling about now?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Robin, what are they mumbling about now?

records.m_Talk_ENG: A-ah, well...
records.m_Talk_DEU: A-ah, well...
records.m_Talk_FRA: A-ah, well...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I think Lady Sita wants to come with us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I think Lady Sita wants to come with us.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I think Lady Sita wants to come with us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah, Lady Sita says...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah, Lady Sita says...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah, Lady Sita says...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Lady Sita...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Lady Sita...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Lady Sita...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll do it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll do it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll do it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is... just my request...
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is... just my request...
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is... just my request...

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...A long time ago,
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...A long time ago,
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...A long time ago,

records.m_Talk_ENG: Grandfather... saved me...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Grandfather... saved me...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Grandfather... saved me...

records.m_Talk_ENG: So now...
records.m_Talk_DEU: So now...
records.m_Talk_FRA: So now...

records.m_Talk_ENG: So now, I want to help him...
records.m_Talk_DEU: So now, I want to help him...
records.m_Talk_FRA: So now, I want to help him...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I will be of help...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I will be of help...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I will be of help...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Please... won't you let me, Ms. Mi Rinae...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Please... won't you let me, Ms. Mi Rinae...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Please... won't you let me, Ms. Mi Rinae...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, you speak better than I thought! And with such a pretty voice too!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, you speak better than I thought! And with such a pretty voice too!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, you speak better than I thought! And with such a pretty voice too!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now, how about showing us your face too?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now, how about showing us your face too?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now, how about showing us your face too?

records.m_Talk_ENG: N-no...! Not yet...
records.m_Talk_DEU: N-no...! Not yet...
records.m_Talk_FRA: N-no...! Not yet...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, Just kidding! Gotta respect the character traits, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, Just kidding! Gotta respect the character traits, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, Just kidding! Gotta respect the character traits, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well then, why not? Let's do this!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well then, why not? Let's do this!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well then, why not? Let's do this!

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Corrupted Area spread all the way inside the base camp?
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Corrupted Area spread all the way inside the base camp?
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Corrupted Area spread all the way inside the base camp?

root.m_Talk_ENG: If Campamento's Corruption Inhibitor can't even function, this is no ordinary crisis!
root.m_Talk_DEU: If Campamento's Corruption Inhibitor can't even function, this is no ordinary crisis!
root.m_Talk_FRA: If Campamento's Corruption Inhibitor can't even function, this is no ordinary crisis!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Come on, Robin! Don't just stand there! Move it!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Come on, Robin! Don't just stand there! Move it!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Come on, Robin! Don't just stand there! Move it!

root.m_Talk_ENG: M-Ms. Mi Rinae!
root.m_Talk_DEU: M-Ms. Mi Rinae!
root.m_Talk_FRA: M-Ms. Mi Rinae!

root.m_Talk_ENG: C.O.s are swarming in! We can't just leave them!
root.m_Talk_DEU: C.O.s are swarming in! We can't just leave them!
root.m_Talk_FRA: C.O.s are swarming in! We can't just leave them!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Did you forget what Teach said? We have our own mission here!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Did you forget what Teach said? We have our own mission here!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Did you forget what Teach said? We have our own mission here!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Can't you see they're buying us time?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Can't you see they're buying us time?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Can't you see they're buying us time?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Y-yes, but...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Y-yes, but...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Y-yes, but...

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're the Counters sent from Ground One, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're the Counters sent from Ground One, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're the Counters sent from Ground One, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: We've been briefed! Leave this sector to us!
root.m_Talk_DEU: We've been briefed! Leave this sector to us!
root.m_Talk_FRA: We've been briefed! Leave this sector to us!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Campamento Administration is strong! Our TASKFORCEs are tightly bonded!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Campamento Administration is strong! Our TASKFORCEs are tightly bonded!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Campamento Administration is strong! Our TASKFORCEs are tightly bonded!

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's right! Disasters like this are practically routine just outside base camp!
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's right! Disasters like this are practically routine just outside base camp!
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's right! Disasters like this are practically routine just outside base camp!

root.m_Talk_ENG: So trust us and go! Save our VIP!
root.m_Talk_DEU: So trust us and go! Save our VIP!
root.m_Talk_FRA: So trust us and go! Save our VIP!

root.m_Talk_ENG: He may be eccentric, but we can't do without him!
root.m_Talk_DEU: He may be eccentric, but we can't do without him!
root.m_Talk_FRA: He may be eccentric, but we can't do without him!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha! Don't you worry!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha! Don't you worry!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha! Don't you worry!

root.m_Talk_ENG: We're Ground Administration's finest of the fine. We'll bring back old man Khan safe and sound.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We're Ground Administration's finest of the fine. We'll bring back old man Khan safe and sound.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We're Ground Administration's finest of the fine. We'll bring back old man Khan safe and sound.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Right, Robin?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Right, Robin?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Right, Robin?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Ah, yes...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Ah, yes...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Ah, yes...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: On my honor as a knight, I promise you all!
root.m_Talk_DEU: On my honor as a knight, I promise you all!
root.m_Talk_FRA: On my honor as a knight, I promise you all!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You heard them! The base camp's last line of defense is ours to hold!
root.m_Talk_DEU: You heard them! The base camp's last line of defense is ours to hold!
root.m_Talk_FRA: You heard them! The base camp's last line of defense is ours to hold!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even if it costs us our lives, we'll see the Counters through!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even if it costs us our lives, we'll see the Counters through!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even if it costs us our lives, we'll see the Counters through!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now do you get it?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now do you get it?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now do you get it?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The weight of what we're about to do... what it means to be a Counter on the battlefield.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The weight of what we're about to do... what it means to be a Counter on the battlefield.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The weight of what we're about to do... what it means to be a Counter on the battlefield.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We are their hope.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We are their hope.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We are their hope.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. I understand. I won't hesitate again.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. I understand. I won't hesitate again.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. I understand. I won't hesitate again.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha! That look in your eyes. I like it! Glad you caught my drift.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha! That look in your eyes. I like it! Glad you caught my drift.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha! That look in your eyes. I like it! Glad you caught my drift.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Let's go. Follow me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Let's go. Follow me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Let's go. Follow me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We received word from Ground One's Senior.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We received word from Ground One's Senior.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We received word from Ground One's Senior.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you for answering Campamento Administration's request.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you for answering Campamento Administration's request.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you for answering Campamento Administration's request.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Aw, c'mon. Neighbors help each other in hard times, don't they?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Aw, c'mon. Neighbors help each other in hard times, don't they?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Aw, c'mon. Neighbors help each other in hard times, don't they?

root.m_Talk_ENG: And even without old man Khan, you've all been handling the crisis pretty well yourselves.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And even without old man Khan, you've all been handling the crisis pretty well yourselves.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And even without old man Khan, you've all been handling the crisis pretty well yourselves.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Well, I suppose we've gotten used to emergencies.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Well, I suppose we've gotten used to emergencies.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Well, I suppose we've gotten used to emergencies.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Not that complacency is a good thing.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Not that complacency is a good thing.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Not that complacency is a good thing.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Our VIP always brings trouble down on Campamento.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Our VIP always brings trouble down on Campamento.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Our VIP always brings trouble down on Campamento.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Claims against us from other cities alone exceed seven billion credits.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Claims against us from other cities alone exceed seven billion credits.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Claims against us from other cities alone exceed seven billion credits.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ahaha... Seven billion...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ahaha... Seven billion...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ahaha... Seven billion...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What kind of nonsense has that old man been up to...
root.m_Talk_DEU: What kind of nonsense has that old man been up to...
root.m_Talk_FRA: What kind of nonsense has that old man been up to...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Still, he looks after our people like family.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Still, he looks after our people like family.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Still, he looks after our people like family.

root.m_Talk_ENG: For all his faults, you just can't hate him.
root.m_Talk_DEU: For all his faults, you just can't hate him.
root.m_Talk_FRA: For all his faults, you just can't hate him.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But Ms. Mi Rinae...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: But Ms. Mi Rinae...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: But Ms. Mi Rinae...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: How do you know Campamento's Senior?
root.m_Talk_DEU: How do you know Campamento's Senior?
root.m_Talk_FRA: How do you know Campamento's Senior?

root.m_Talk_ENG: A-ha, that?
root.m_Talk_DEU: A-ha, that?
root.m_Talk_FRA: A-ha, that?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I know him all too well. That old man used to be a <color=#ffd34c>person of interest</color>.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I know him all too well. That old man used to be a <color=#ffd34c>person of interest</color>.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I know him all too well. That old man used to be a <color=#ffd34c>person of interest</color>.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A person of interest?
root.m_Talk_DEU: A person of interest?
root.m_Talk_FRA: A person of interest?

root.m_Talk_ENG: These days they call him Senior Khan. But back then, he went by Master Khan.
root.m_Talk_DEU: These days they call him Senior Khan. But back then, he went by Master Khan.
root.m_Talk_FRA: These days they call him Senior Khan. But back then, he went by Master Khan.

root.m_Talk_ENG: After the Administration Failure, and the Counterside was exposed to the public...
root.m_Talk_DEU: After the Administration Failure, and the Counterside was exposed to the public...
root.m_Talk_FRA: After the Administration Failure, and the Counterside was exposed to the public...

root.m_Talk_ENG: He became the treasure hunter who unearthed more Artifacts than anyone else.
root.m_Talk_DEU: He became the treasure hunter who unearthed more Artifacts than anyone else.
root.m_Talk_FRA: He became the treasure hunter who unearthed more Artifacts than anyone else.

root.m_Talk_ENG: C-Campamento's Senior sounds like an amazing man...
root.m_Talk_DEU: C-Campamento's Senior sounds like an amazing man...
root.m_Talk_FRA: C-Campamento's Senior sounds like an amazing man...

root.m_Talk_ENG: In a way, yeah, he is.
root.m_Talk_DEU: In a way, yeah, he is.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In a way, yeah, he is.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...But you know what they say. Too much of anything is poison.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...But you know what they say. Too much of anything is poison.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...But you know what they say. Too much of anything is poison.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Especially when technology and mysteries beyond our world's level spike the global Corruption rate.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Especially when technology and mysteries beyond our world's level spike the global Corruption rate.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Especially when technology and mysteries beyond our world's level spike the global Corruption rate.

root.m_Talk_ENG: No wonder he got marked as a person of interest by the Administration.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No wonder he got marked as a person of interest by the Administration.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No wonder he got marked as a person of interest by the Administration.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And <color=#ffd34c>cleaning up</color> his messes under Teach's name gave me my share of headaches too.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And <color=#ffd34c>cleaning up</color> his messes under Teach's name gave me my share of headaches too.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And <color=#ffd34c>cleaning up</color> his messes under Teach's name gave me my share of headaches too.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Cleaning up...? What do you mean by that?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Cleaning up...? What do you mean by that?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Cleaning up...? What do you mean by that?

root.m_Talk_ENG: We've arrived.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We've arrived.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We've arrived.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Please wait a moment...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Please wait a moment...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Please wait a moment...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Lady Sita, the Counters dispatched from Ground One have arrived.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Lady Sita, the Counters dispatched from Ground One have arrived.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Lady Sita, the Counters dispatched from Ground One have arrived.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Please, come inside.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Please, come inside.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Please, come inside.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This is Lady Sita, temporarily overseeing the Campamento Administration.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This is Lady Sita, temporarily overseeing the Campamento Administration.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This is Lady Sita, temporarily overseeing the Campamento Administration.

root.m_Talk_ENG: She's the VIP's granddaughter, you could say.
root.m_Talk_DEU: She's the VIP's granddaughter, you could say.
root.m_Talk_FRA: She's the VIP's granddaughter, you could say.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ahaha, you've got a rather unusual way of greeting us.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ahaha, you've got a rather unusual way of greeting us.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ahaha, you've got a rather unusual way of greeting us.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Pleased to meet you. I'm Mi Rinae, and this here's Robin.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Pleased to meet you. I'm Mi Rinae, and this here's Robin.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Pleased to meet you. I'm Mi Rinae, and this here's Robin.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Um... hello? Can you hear us?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Um... hello? Can you hear us?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Um... hello? Can you hear us?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Her voice...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Her voice...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Her voice...

root.m_Talk_ENG: "Hello, everyone."
root.m_Talk_DEU: "Hello, everyone."
root.m_Talk_FRA: "Hello, everyone."

root.m_Talk_ENG: "Thank you for answering Campamento Administration's call."
root.m_Talk_DEU: "Thank you for answering Campamento Administration's call."
root.m_Talk_FRA: "Thank you for answering Campamento Administration's call."

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...is what Lady Sita says to you all.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...is what Lady Sita says to you all.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...is what Lady Sita says to you all.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
W-what the
8g? What's going on here?!
root.m_Talk_DEU:
W-what the
8g? What's going on here?!
root.m_Talk_FRA:
W-what the
8g? What's going on here?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Wait, Ms. Mi Rinae!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Wait, Ms. Mi Rinae!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Wait, Ms. Mi Rinae!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I-I think I just heard a whisper in my ear...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I-I think I just heard a whisper in my ear...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I-I think I just heard a whisper in my ear...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: What?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: What?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: What?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What? Really?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What? Really?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What? Really?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe your <color=#ffd34c>thought</color> frequencies just synced.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe your <color=#ffd34c>thought</color> frequencies just synced.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe your <color=#ffd34c>thought</color> frequencies just synced.

root.m_Talk_ENG: "How strange. It wasn't intentional, but this is the first time it's happened."
root.m_Talk_DEU: "How strange. It wasn't intentional, but this is the first time it's happened."
root.m_Talk_FRA: "How strange. It wasn't intentional, but this is the first time it's happened."

root.m_Talk_ENG: "Maybe we'll become good friends."
root.m_Talk_DEU: "Maybe we'll become good friends."
root.m_Talk_FRA: "Maybe we'll become good friends."

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...is what Lady Sita says to Robin.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...is what Lady Sita says to Robin.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...is what Lady Sita says to Robin.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thought frequency? Is that like telepathy...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thought frequency? Is that like telepathy...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thought frequency? Is that like telepathy...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: N-nah! There's way too much to nitpick here...
root.m_Talk_DEU: N-nah! There's way too much to nitpick here...
root.m_Talk_FRA: N-nah! There's way too much to nitpick here...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Please forgive...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Please forgive...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Please forgive...

root.m_Talk_ENG:
"Please forgive me, Ms. Mi Rinae. We haven
8kt met before... and I tend to be shy around strangers..."
root.m_Talk_DEU:
"Please forgive me, Ms. Mi Rinae. We haven
8kt met before... and I tend to be shy around strangers..."
root.m_Talk_FRA:
"Please forgive me, Ms. Mi Rinae. We haven
8kt met before... and I tend to be shy around strangers..."

root.m_Talk_ENG: "Normally, I have my secretary relay my words."
root.m_Talk_DEU: "Normally, I have my secretary relay my words."
root.m_Talk_FRA: "Normally, I have my secretary relay my words."

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...is what Lady Sita says with regret.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...is what Lady Sita says with regret.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...is what Lady Sita says with regret.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wow! Seriously... this is worse than Bora ever was!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wow! Seriously... this is worse than Bora ever was!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wow! Seriously... this is worse than Bora ever was!

root.m_Talk_ENG: At least Bora could still communicate... But this girl leaves even that to someone else?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: At least Bora could still communicate... But this girl leaves even that to someone else?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: At least Bora could still communicate... But this girl leaves even that to someone else?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: P-please calm down, Ms. Mi Rinae...
root.m_Talk_DEU: P-please calm down, Ms. Mi Rinae...
root.m_Talk_FRA: P-please calm down, Ms. Mi Rinae...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then what about you?! Why are you putting on a performance too?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then what about you?! Why are you putting on a performance too?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then what about you?! Why are you putting on a performance too?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, I majored in storytelling at university...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, I majored in storytelling at university...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, I majored in storytelling at university...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ah...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ah...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ah...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Aha! I get it now!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Aha! I get it now!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Aha! I get it now!

root.m_Talk_ENG: So that's the gimmick! Right, right! Makes sense!
root.m_Talk_DEU: So that's the gimmick! Right, right! Makes sense!
root.m_Talk_FRA: So that's the gimmick! Right, right! Makes sense!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ms. Mi Rinae's... starting to reject reality...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ms. Mi Rinae's... starting to reject reality...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ms. Mi Rinae's... starting to reject reality...

root.m_Talk_ENG: So to sum up...
root.m_Talk_DEU: So to sum up...
root.m_Talk_FRA: So to sum up...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Old man Khan went to the floating island chasing the Golden Vale's Legacy?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Old man Khan went to the floating island chasing the Golden Vale's Legacy?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Old man Khan went to the floating island chasing the Golden Vale's Legacy?

root.m_Talk_ENG: But given Campamento's Celestial Grand Dimension Crevice, there should be loads of floating isles, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: But given Campamento's Celestial Grand Dimension Crevice, there should be loads of floating isles, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: But given Campamento's Celestial Grand Dimension Crevice, there should be loads of floating isles, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Last...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Last...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Last...

root.m_Talk_ENG: "Last reported location was the <color=#ffd34c>Dawnbreak Floating Island</color>."
root.m_Talk_DEU: "Last reported location was the <color=#ffd34c>Dawnbreak Floating Island</color>."
root.m_Talk_FRA: "Last reported location was the <color=#ffd34c>Dawnbreak Floating Island</color>."

root.m_Talk_ENG: What a strange name... Dawnbreak Floating Island?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What a strange name... Dawnbreak Floating Island?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What a strange name... Dawnbreak Floating Island?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, might sound odd to us.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, might sound odd to us.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, might sound odd to us.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But most of those isles were once home to tribes of the Amazon Basin.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But most of those isles were once home to tribes of the Amazon Basin.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But most of those isles were once home to tribes of the Amazon Basin.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Amazon Basin tribes?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Amazon Basin tribes?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Amazon Basin tribes?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's right. Even twenty years after the Grand Dimension Crevice, some still live on the floating islands.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's right. Even twenty years after the Grand Dimension Crevice, some still live on the floating islands.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's right. Even twenty years after the Grand Dimension Crevice, some still live on the floating islands.

root.m_Talk_ENG: There's the Stormy Floating Island, the Turbulent Floating Island, the Misty Floating Island...
root.m_Talk_DEU: There's the Stormy Floating Island, the Turbulent Floating Island, the Misty Floating Island...
root.m_Talk_FRA: There's the Stormy Floating Island, the Turbulent Floating Island, the Misty Floating Island...

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Administration manages them, but respects the natives' names.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Administration manages them, but respects the natives' names.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Administration manages them, but respects the natives' names.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I see... let's see here...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I see... let's see here...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I see... let's see here...

root.m_Talk_ENG: On the map, Dawnbreak Floating Island is here... altitude ten thousand meters.
root.m_Talk_DEU: On the map, Dawnbreak Floating Island is here... altitude ten thousand meters.
root.m_Talk_FRA: On the map, Dawnbreak Floating Island is here... altitude ten thousand meters.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Good. Then no need to worry.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Good. Then no need to worry.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Good. Then no need to worry.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Time's short. Just get us the gear to reach the floating island. We'll be back before you know it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Time's short. Just get us the gear to reach the floating island. We'll be back before you know it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Time's short. Just get us the gear to reach the floating island. We'll be back before you know it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: W-what is it, Lady Sita?
root.m_Talk_DEU: W-what is it, Lady Sita?
root.m_Talk_FRA: W-what is it, Lady Sita?

root.m_Talk_ENG: No, you mustn't! With the VIP absent, if you leave too...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: No, you mustn't! With the VIP absent, if you leave too...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: No, you mustn't! With the VIP absent, if you leave too...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...But.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...But.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...But.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Still... even so...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Still... even so...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Still... even so...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Understood.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Understood.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Understood.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh for crying out loud. I've seen it all, but this is a first.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh for crying out loud. I've seen it all, but this is a first.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh for crying out loud. I've seen it all, but this is a first.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Robin, what are they mumbling about now?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Robin, what are they mumbling about now?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Robin, what are they mumbling about now?

root.m_Talk_ENG: A-ah, well...
root.m_Talk_DEU: A-ah, well...
root.m_Talk_FRA: A-ah, well...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I think Lady Sita wants to come with us.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I think Lady Sita wants to come with us.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I think Lady Sita wants to come with us.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ah, Lady Sita says...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ah, Lady Sita says...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ah, Lady Sita says...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Lady Sita...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Lady Sita...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Lady Sita...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll do it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll do it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll do it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This is... just my request...
root.m_Talk_DEU: This is... just my request...
root.m_Talk_FRA: This is... just my request...

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...A long time ago,
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...A long time ago,
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...A long time ago,

root.m_Talk_ENG: Grandfather... saved me...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Grandfather... saved me...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Grandfather... saved me...

root.m_Talk_ENG: So now...
root.m_Talk_DEU: So now...
root.m_Talk_FRA: So now...

root.m_Talk_ENG: So now, I want to help him...
root.m_Talk_DEU: So now, I want to help him...
root.m_Talk_FRA: So now, I want to help him...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I will be of help...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I will be of help...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I will be of help...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Please... won't you let me, Ms. Mi Rinae...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Please... won't you let me, Ms. Mi Rinae...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Please... won't you let me, Ms. Mi Rinae...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, you speak better than I thought! And with such a pretty voice too!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, you speak better than I thought! And with such a pretty voice too!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, you speak better than I thought! And with such a pretty voice too!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now, how about showing us your face too?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now, how about showing us your face too?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now, how about showing us your face too?

root.m_Talk_ENG: N-no...! Not yet...
root.m_Talk_DEU: N-no...! Not yet...
root.m_Talk_FRA: N-no...! Not yet...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, Just kidding! Gotta respect the character traits, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, Just kidding! Gotta respect the character traits, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, Just kidding! Gotta respect the character traits, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Well then, why not? Let's do this!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Well then, why not? Let's do this!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Well then, why not? Let's do this!
